Recent Surgery Requiring Active SNF Care CHAR 1 Indicates whether the resident had a major surgical procedure during the prior inpatient hospital stay that requires active care during the SNF stay. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
8 = Unknown effective 10/01/2019
770 J2300_KNEE_RPLCMT_IND J2300_KNEE_RPLCMT_IND J2300 Knee Replacement - Partial or Total CHAR 1 Knee Replacement - partial or total requiring SNF service.
771 J2310_HIP_RPLCMT_IND J2310_HIP_RPLCMT_IND J2310 Hip Replacement - Partial or Total CHAR 1
